ns0:entry.ns0:title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Graphify-Labs/graphify
Language: python
AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
Language: python
100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alirezarezvani/claude-skills
Language: python
345 Claude Code skills & agent skills & plugins (30+ Agents, 70+ custom commands, 330+ skills, customizable references, scripts)for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory, research, business operations, commercial & finance, and your daily productivity skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ansible/ansible
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ansible/ansible
Language: python
Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems. https://docs.ansible.com.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bradautomates/claude-video
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bradautomates/claude-video
Language: python
Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cheahjs/free-llm-api-resources
Language: python
A list of free LLM inference resources accessible via API.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/davila7/claude-code-templates
Language: python
CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: home-assistant/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/home-assistant/core
Language: python
🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/huggingface/speech-to-speech
Language: python
Build local voice agents with open-source models

A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)

Langflow is a powerful tool for building and deploying AI-powered agents and workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unclecode/crawl4ai
Language: python
🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper. Don't be shy, join here: https://discord.gg/jP8KfhDhyN

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usestrix/strix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usestrix/strix
Language: python
Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xbtlin/ai-berkshire
Language: python
AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
